channel.description: Recent content in Corrado Rizzoli on LMI

item.title: Weak Interactions Modulating The Dimensionality In Supramoleculararchitectures In Three New Nickel(Ii)-Hydrazone Complexes,Magnetostructural Correlation, And Catalytic Potential For Epoxidationof Alkenes Under Phase Transfer Conditions
The Key Role Of Hydrogen Bonding In The Nuclearity Of Three Copper(Ii)Complexes With Hydrazone-Derived Ligands And Nitrogen Donor Heterocycles
